acceptance.android_qualification: all existing full runtime checks remain true
acceptance.direct_profile_M: canonical header, truthful upstream producer and target identity, dynamic unpacked-root paths, clang/clang++/llvm-ar, Bionic macro, and both 16 KiB linker flags
acceptance.managed_profile_M: after uv canonical sysconfig rewrite, marker and bounded SDK flags survive; uv-normalized cc/c++/ar names are accepted
acceptance.managed_source_extension: build, install, import, ELF inventory, and 16 KiB LOAD alignment pass without wheel repair

sysconfig_representation.canonical_literal_mapping: contains bounded profile-M static toolchain values, Android flags, metadata marker, and /install placeholders
sysconfig_representation.direct_runtime_trailing_code: resolves only install-root-dependent paths for a directly unpacked standalone tree
sysconfig_representation.producer_provenance: BUILD_GNU_TYPE and CONFIG_ARGS remain truthful upstream values
sysconfig_representation.uv_managed_install: uv replaces /install with the managed prefix, normalizes clang-family tool names, serializes the literal mapping, and therefore retains profile-M semantics

distributor: direct and managed profile-M SDK semantics
baseline direct and managed extension 16 KiB alignment
external_user_tooling: RPATH or RUNPATH removal from user-created wheels
auditwheel-like dependency repair and publication packaging
